title: Craft Reversal
description: A datapack that lets you uncraft Items that you crafted by mistake and take back you'r valuables.
body:
# 🛠️ Craft Reversal **Regret Nothing. Reclaim Everything.** Ever crafted something and instantly wished you hadn’t? Craft Reversal lets you take back control. This datapack introduces a sleek uncrafting system that salvages only the valuable core resources from crafted items — no fluff, no duplication, just smart recovery. Whether it’s a diamond tool, enchanted gear, or rare loot, you can now reverse your crafting mistakes and get back what truly matters. Perfect for survivalists, perfectionists, and anyone who hates waste. **🔁 Features: ** - Uncraft items and recover key ingredients - Balanced to prevent exploitation - Supports rare and high-value items - Seamless integration with existing gameplay - Works with Minecraft 1.21+ - Make smarter choices. Or undo the dumb ones._** Craft Reversal**_ — because every block counts. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **Current Craft Reversal Items available:** **_1. Diamond Armours:_** Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots **_2. Diamond Tools:_** Sword, Axe, Pickaxe and Hoes _**3. Netherite Armour:**_ Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots _**4. Netherite Tools:**_ Sword, Axe, Pickaxe and Hoes **More Pictures Recipes on the way!!! Will BE THERE SOON!!!** ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **Try Out my other Modpacks and More!!! [Coming More Soon!!]** -

[A datapack that lets you uncraft Items that you crafted by mistake and take back you'r valuables.] -
